Row.Text: The frozen earth yields to those who wait with patience.
冻土终将让步于耐心的等待者。

Tundra and Tundra Hills tiles receive -1 [ICON_Production] Production, +1 [ICON_Food] Food, +1 [ICON_Gold] Gold. Each [ICON_Citizen] Population provides +0.5 [ICON_Production] Production, +0.5 [ICON_Science] Science, +0.5 [ICON_Culture] Culture.
冻土和冻土丘陵单元格 -1 [ICON_Production] 生产力，+1 [ICON_Food] 粮食，+1 [ICON_Gold] 金币。每个 [ICON_Citizen] 人口提供 +0.5 [ICON_Production] 生产力，+0.5 [ICON_Science] 科技，+0.5 [ICON_Culture] 文化。
